---
title: "Los Angeles, California"
subtitle: "-"
number: 5
image: /images/los_angeles_CA.jpg
image-alt: "Image of Los Angeles, California"
categories: ["Rate Setting", "Service Procurement"]
---
{{< include _return-to-pf.qmd >}}

::: {.article}

# Commercial Franchise Rate Method / Procurement

TODO: Contents

:::
